message:
fix(engine): wrapping arithmetic in bytecode VM and continuation cliff atlas in tail tournament gate

bytecode_vm.rs: Replace unchecked Add/Sub/Mul/Div with wrapping_add,
wrapping_sub, wrapping_mul, and wrapping_div respectively. This prevents
undefined-behavior-adjacent panics on integer overflow in debug builds
and matches JavaScript's wrapping semantics for integer arithmetic.
Division-by-zero still returns VmError::DivisionByZero as before.

catastrophic_tail_tournament_gate.rs (+445 lines):
- Add CliffBand enum (Stable/NearCliff/BeyondCliff/MissingNeighborhood)
  for classifying threat neighborhoods by proximity to tail risk cliffs
- Add CliffMarginCertificate: per-threat certificate with CVaR margin,
  e-value margin, and observation margin measurements
- Add CliffWitness: concrete evidence of a cliff or near-cliff condition
- Add ContinuationCliffAtlas: aggregated atlas of cliff certificates
  across all threat classes with overall stability verdict
- Add atlas construction from TailTournamentGate state with
  configurable near-cliff margin threshold
- CONTINUATION_CLIFF_ATLAS_SCHEMA_VERSION constant

Integration tests (+183 lines): verify atlas construction, cliff band
classification, margin computation, and stability verdicts.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
